root_text.an10.67:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā kosalesu cārikaṁ caramāno mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ yena naḷakapānaṁ nāma kosalānaṁ nigamo tadavasari.
root_text.an10.67:1.2: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā naḷakapāne viharati palāsavane.
root_text.an10.67:1.3: Tena kho pana samayena bhagavā tadahuposathe bhikkhusaṅghaparivuto nisinno hoti.
root_text.an10.67:1.4: Atha kho bhagavā bahudeva rattiṁ bhikkhūnaṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā tuṇhībhūtaṁ tuṇhībhūtaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ anuviloketvā āyasmantaṁ sāriputtaṁ āmantesi:
root_text.an10.67:2.2: Paṭibhātu taṁ, sāriputta, bhikkhūnaṁ dhammī kathā.
root_text.an10.67:2.5: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā sāriputto bhagavato paccassosi.
root_text.an10.67:3.1: Atha kho bhagavā catugguṇaṁ saṅghāṭiṁ paññāpetvā dakkhiṇena passena sīhaseyyaṁ kappesi pāde pādaṁ accādhāya sato sampajāno uṭṭhānasaññaṁ manasi karitvā.
root_text.an10.67:3.2: Tatra kho āyasmā sāriputto bhikkhū āmantesi:
root_text.an10.67:3.4: “Āvuso”ti kho te bhikkhū āyasmato sāriputtassa paccassosuṁ.
root_text.an10.67:4.1: “Yassa kassaci, āvuso, saddhā natthi kusalesu dhammesu, hirī natthi …
root_text.an10.67:4.4: paññā natthi kusalesu dhammesu, tassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, hāniyeva pāṭikaṅkhā kusalesu dhammesu no vuddhi.
root_text.an10.67:4.5: Seyyathāpi, āvuso, kāḷapakkhe candassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, hāyateva vaṇṇena hāyati maṇḍalena hāyati ābhāya hāyati ārohapariṇāhena;
root_text.an10.67:4.6: evamevaṁ kho, āvuso, yassa kassaci saddhā natthi kusalesu dhammesu, hirī natthi …
root_text.an10.67:4.9: paññā natthi kusalesu dhammesu, tassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, hāniyeva pāṭikaṅkhā kusalesu dhammesu no vuddhi.
root_text.an10.67:6.1: Yassa kassaci, āvuso, saddhā atthi kusalesu dhammesu, hirī atthi …
root_text.an10.67:6.3: paññā atthi kusalesu dhammesu, tassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, vuddhiyeva pāṭikaṅkhā kusalesu dhammesu no parihāni.
root_text.an10.67:6.4: Seyyathāpi, āvuso, juṇhapakkhe candassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, vaḍḍhateva vaṇṇena vaḍḍhati maṇḍalena vaḍḍhati ābhāya vaḍḍhati ārohapariṇāhena;
root_text.an10.67:6.5: evamevaṁ kho, āvuso, yassa kassaci saddhā atthi kusalesu dhammesu, hirī atthi …
root_text.an10.67:6.8: paññā atthi kusalesu dhammesu, tassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, vuddhiyeva pāṭikaṅkhā kusalesu dhammesu no parihāni.
root_text.an10.67:8.1: Atha kho bhagavā paccuṭṭhāya āyasmantaṁ sāriputtaṁ āmantesi:
root_text.an10.67:8.3: Yassa kassaci, sāriputta, saddhā natthi kusalesu dhammesu, hirī natthi …
root_text.an10.67:8.6: paññā natthi kusalesu dhammesu, tassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, hāniyeva pāṭikaṅkhā kusalesu dhammesu no vuddhi.
root_text.an10.67:8.7: Seyyathāpi, sāriputta, kāḷapakkhe candassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, hāyateva vaṇṇena hāyati maṇḍalena hāyati ābhāya hāyati ārohapariṇāhena;
root_text.an10.67:8.8: evamevaṁ kho, sāriputta, yassa kassaci saddhā natthi kusalesu dhammesu …pe…
root_text.an10.67:8.9: paññā natthi kusalesu dhammesu, tassa yā ratti vā divaso vā …pe… no vuddhi.
root_text.an10.67:10.1: Yassa kassaci, sāriputta, saddhā atthi kusalesu dhammesu, hirī atthi …
root_text.an10.67:10.4: paññā atthi kusalesu dhammesu, tassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, vuddhiyeva pāṭikaṅkhā kusalesu dhammesu no parihāni.
root_text.an10.67:10.5: Seyyathāpi, sāriputta, juṇhapakkhe candassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, vaḍḍhateva vaṇṇena vaḍḍhati maṇḍalena vaḍḍhati ābhāya vaḍḍhati ārohapariṇāhena;
root_text.an10.67:10.6: evamevaṁ kho, sāriputta, yassa kassaci saddhā atthi kusalesu dhammesu, hirī atthi …
root_text.an10.67:10.9: paññā atthi kusalesu dhammesu, tassa yā ratti vā divaso vā āgacchati, vuddhiyeva pāṭikaṅkhā kusalesu dhammesu no parihāni.

translation_text.an10.67:1.1: At one time the Buddha was wandering in the land of the Kosalans together with a large Saṅgha of mendicants when he arrived at a town of the Kosalans named Naḷakapāna.
translation_text.an10.67:1.2: There the Buddha stayed near Naḷakapāna in the grove of flame-of-the-forest trees.
translation_text.an10.67:1.3: Now, at that time it was the sabbath, and the Buddha was sitting surrounded by a Saṅgha of monks.
translation_text.an10.67:1.4: The Buddha spent much of the night educating, encouraging, firing up, and inspiring the mendicants with a Dhamma talk. Then he looked around the Saṅgha of mendicants, who were so very silent. He addressed Venerable Sāriputta:
translation_text.an10.67:2.1: “Sāriputta, the Saṅgha of mendicants is rid of dullness and drowsiness.
translation_text.an10.67:2.2: Give them some Dhamma talk as you feel inspired.
translation_text.an10.67:3.1: And then the Buddha spread out his outer robe folded in four and laid down in the lion’s posture—on the right side, placing one foot on top of the other—mindful and aware, and focused on the time of getting up.
translation_text.an10.67:4.1: “Reverends, whoever has no faith, conscience, prudence, energy, and wisdom when it comes to skillful qualities
translation_text.an10.67:4.4: can expect decline, not growth, in skillful qualities, whether by day or by night.
translation_text.an10.67:4.5: It’s like the moon in the waning fortnight. Whether by day or by night, its beauty, roundness, luminosity, and diameter and circumference only decline.
translation_text.an10.67:4.6: In the same way, whoever has no faith, conscience, prudence, energy, and wisdom when it comes to skillful qualities
translation_text.an10.67:4.9: can expect decline, not growth, in skillful qualities, whether by day or by night.
translation_text.an10.67:5.1: A faithless individual is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:5.2: An individual with no conscience is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:5.3: An imprudent individual is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:5.4: A lazy individual is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:5.5: A witless individual is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:5.6: An irritable individual is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:5.7: An acrimonious individual is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:5.8: An individual with corrupt wishes is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:5.9: An individual with bad friends is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:5.10: An individual with wrong view is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:6.1: Whoever has faith, conscience, prudence, energy, and wisdom when it comes to skillful qualities
translation_text.an10.67:6.3: can expect growth, not decline, in skillful qualities, whether by day or by night.
translation_text.an10.67:6.4: It’s like the moon in the waxing fortnight. Whether by day or by night, its beauty, roundness, luminosity, and diameter and circumference only grow.
translation_text.an10.67:6.5: In the same way, whoever has faith, conscience, prudence, energy, and wisdom when it comes to skillful qualities
translation_text.an10.67:6.8: can expect growth, not decline, in skillful qualities, whether by day or by night.
translation_text.an10.67:7.2: An individual with a conscience doesn’t decline.
translation_text.an10.67:7.8: An individual with few desires doesn’t decline.
translation_text.an10.67:7.9: An individual with good friends doesn’t decline.
translation_text.an10.67:7.10: An individual with right view doesn’t decline.”
translation_text.an10.67:8.1: Then the Buddha got up and said to Venerable Sāriputta:
translation_text.an10.67:8.3: Whoever has no faith, conscience, prudence, energy, and wisdom when it comes to skillful qualities
translation_text.an10.67:8.6: can expect decline, not growth, in skillful qualities, whether by day or by night.
translation_text.an10.67:8.7: It’s like the moon in the waning fortnight. Whether by day or by night, its beauty, roundness, luminosity, and diameter and circumference only decline.
translation_text.an10.67:8.8: In the same way, whoever has no faith, conscience, prudence, energy, and wisdom when it comes to skillful qualities
translation_text.an10.67:8.9: can expect decline, not growth, in skillful qualities, whether by day or by night.
translation_text.an10.67:9.1: A faithless individual is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:9.10: An individual with wrong view is in decline.
translation_text.an10.67:10.1: Whoever has faith, conscience, prudence, energy, and wisdom when it comes to skillful qualities
translation_text.an10.67:10.4: can expect growth, not decline, in skillful qualities, whether by day or by night.
translation_text.an10.67:10.5: It’s like the moon in the waxing fortnight. Whether by day or by night, its beauty, roundness, luminosity, and diameter and circumference only grow.
translation_text.an10.67:10.6: In the same way, whoever has faith, conscience, prudence, energy, and wisdom when it comes to skillful qualities
translation_text.an10.67:10.9: can expect growth, not decline, in skillful qualities, whether by day or by night.
translation_text.an10.67:11.10: An individual with right view doesn’t decline.”
